name: Bloomwild
description: A warm, low planet smothered in flowering grassland, from pollen-fogged plains and humid bloom-forests to dust basins worn smooth by migrating herds. Colossal grazers roam everywhere in great droves, trailed by the carnivorous flowers and stinging swarms that feed on them. Nothing here is stone, gem, or metal — the whole world is hide, sap, and petal.
mood: Warm, drowsy, and thick with sweet rot and the drone of insects. The ground trembles whenever the herds pass.
biome: pollen-fogged flowering plains grazed by colossal herds

enemies.name: Grazer Calf
enemies.role: weak melee that charges in small packs
enemies.description: A knee-high, fuzzy grazing beast with stubby horns.

enemies.name: Pollen Wasp
enemies.role: fast flier, weak, attacks in swarms
enemies.description: A fat yellow wasp dusted thick with pollen.

enemies.name: Spore Pod
enemies.role: slow; bursts into a poison cloud when killed
enemies.description: A bulbous seed-pod swollen tight with spores.

enemies.name: Husk Beetle
enemies.description: A drab beetle plated in a dry, papery husk.

enemies.name: Grazer Bull
enemies.role: sturdy melee bruiser that charges for heavy damage
enemies.description: A shaggy, barrel-chested grazer with curved horns.

enemies.name: Hornet
enemies.role: flier with a ranged sting that poisons on hit
enemies.description: A big black-and-amber hornet with a wet stinger.

enemies.name: Trumpet Bloom
enemies.role: rooted ranged attacker that spits acidic sap
enemies.description: A tall flower with a wide, gaping trumpet mouth.

enemies.name: Snare Vine
enemies.role: roots and slows one target, holding it in place
enemies.description: A creeping vine bristling with grasping tendrils.

enemies.name: Tusker
enemies.role: armored bruiser with a heavy charge that knocks back
enemies.description: A massive grazer with sweeping tusks and thick hide.

enemies.name: Hornet Queen
enemies.role: spawns a Pollen Wasp each turn while stinging at range
enemies.description: A swollen hornet trailing a cluster of drones.

enemies.name: Nightshade
enemies.role: rooted caster that fills nearby tiles with poison clouds
enemies.description: A dark, hooded flower dripping purple sap.

enemies.name: Pitcher Plant
enemies.role: swallows one hero, holding them out of the fight
enemies.description: A huge pitcher-shaped bloom brimming with sap.

enemies.name: Trampler
enemies.role: huge bruiser; stampede strikes the whole front line
enemies.description: A house-sized grazer that flattens everything underfoot.

enemies.name: Goliath Beetle
enemies.role: armored tank that gores hard and shrugs off hits
enemies.description: A car-sized beetle plated in glossy chitin.

enemies.name: Corpse Flower
enemies.role: rooted boss; wide poison cloud and swallows close heroes
enemies.description: A towering, reeking bloom ringed with sticky petals.

enemies.name: Hawk Moth
enemies.role: flying boss that scatters pollen to blind and poison
enemies.description: A giant moth with dusty, eye-spotted wings.

items.name: Bone Knife
items.description: A short blade chipped from a splintered bone.

items.name: Horn Dirk
items.description: A short stabbing blade of polished horn.

items.name: Chitin Blade
items.description: A light sword with an edge cut from beetle shell.

items.name: Tusk Saber
items.description: A curved blade ground from a grazer's tusk; cuts deep.

items.name: Cane Spear
items.description: A long spear of fire-hardened cane.

items.name: Stinger Pike
items.description: A pike tipped with a hornet's stinger; wounds fester.

items.name: Bone Lance
items.description: A heavy lance carved from a single great bone.

items.name: Sinew Bow
items.description: A short bow strung with twisted grazer sinew.

items.name: Horn Bow
items.description: A recurve bow laminated from layered horn.

items.name: Quill Bow
items.description: Looses venom-soaked quills that poison on hit.

items.name: Spore Staff
items.description: Lobs bursting pods that scatter choking spores.

items.name: Pollen Staff
items.description: Puffs blinding clouds of pollen at range.

items.name: Nightshade Staff
items.description: Hurls bolts of distilled nightshade toxin.

items.name: Shell Maul
items.description: A two-handed maul faced with thick beetle shell.

items.name: Jawbone Axe
items.description: A great axe shaped from a beast's heavy jaw.

items.name: Tusk Cleaver
items.description: A massive cleaver split from a bull's tusk.
